tables.name: range_data_default_6max_100BB
tables.createSql:
CREATE TABLE "range_data_default_6max_100BB" (
          "id"               INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
          "concrete_line_id" INTEGER NOT NULL,
          "hole_cards"       VARCHAR NOT NULL,
          "action_name"      VARCHAR NOT NULL,
          "action_size"      REAL    NOT NULL,
          "amount_bb"        REAL    NOT NULL,
          "frequency"        REAL    NOT NULL,
          "hand_ev"          REAL    NULL,
          UNIQUE(concrete_line_id, hole_cards, action_name)
        )

drillTables.name: drill_scenario_lines_default
drillTables.createSql:
CREATE TABLE "drill_scenario_lines_default" (
          "id"            INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
          "drill_name"    VARCHAR NOT NULL,
          "abstract_line" VARCHAR NOT NULL,
          "player_count"  INTEGER NOT NULL,
          "depth"         INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
          UNIQUE(drill_name, abstract_line, player_count, depth)
        )

notes: Bun SQLite in this environment does not expose dbstat, so per-table byte sizes are not page-accurate.
roughRangeFieldPayloadBytes is an approximate lower payload estimate, not the real SQLite storage size.
repeatedHoleCardsBytes and repeatedActionNameBytes show repeated string payload pressure in old row-style range tables.
